details.IncidentDetail: "[50] B39-023B CORR ENRT TO OFC FIRST - START CT FOR HARD CLOSURE - WALNUT AND E CAMP [Shared]"

"[16] ALL TRFC IS INCONJUNCTION WITH CZP and SEMI 1125 "
"[15] INQ IF PILOT CAR W/ 1 WAY TRFC CONTROL OR IF HWY IS CLOSED FOR CONSTRUCTION"
"[13] 100+ CARS STOPPED and TRAFFIC BACKED UP FOR MILES FROM CZP / 1125 SEMI -- 1185 ENRT FROM CHICO"
"[9] THEY CPY 1125 IS IN THEIR COUNTY "
"[7] 1039 CHICO CC 1125 APPEARS TO BE IN THEIR COUNTY "
"[3] RP CONCERNED THAT THIS WILL CAUSE A TC"
"[7] RP WILL SPEAK WITH OTHER INVLD TO SEE IF THEY CAN MOVE VEHS TO NEXT EXIT - WILL CB WITH AN UPDATED 1020 FOR OFCR IF THEY MOVE"

"[7] DRVR OF SEMI PROVIDED HIS INS INFO AND LEFT"

"[2] WHEN THE SEMI PULLED INTO THE REST AREA IT TC INTO STAIRS ON RP RV"
